final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing exploded-view technical diagram of a Sony A7 camera showing all components with their names.

Style/medium: technical illustration, exploded isometric diagram, engineering manual style with clean vector lines
Composition: isometric exploded view with camera body at center, all parts radiating outward in logical assembly order, labeled with leader lines
Subject: Sony A7 mirrorless camera decomposed into all major components (sensor, shutter mechanism, EVF, LCD screen, battery, lens mount, circuit boards, dials, buttons, hot shoe)
Scene/backdrop: clean white or light gray background, no distractions, technical grid optional
Lighting/mood: even studio lighting, neutral and clinical, emphasizing clarity of parts
Color palette: metallic silver and black for camera parts, gray for mechanical components, subtle blue for circuit boards, white background
Materials/textures: brushed aluminum, matte black plastic, glass elements, visible screws and connectors
Text (verbatim): "Sony A7"
Constraints: each part must have a clear leader line to its name; parts must be recognizable and proportionally sized; exploded spacing must show separation without losing visual connection
Avoid: photorealistic rendering; depth of field; artistic lighting; cluttered overlapping parts; missing labels; generic camera shapes
